title: App Importer
subtitle: Conceived in a prompt. Born with the first deploy. Raised in CTOX.
sourceHint: Folder: your coding agent's app (Vite layout). GitHub: public repo; port large repos through the deploy skill.
unsupportedHint: These packages are not vendored. Replace them in the source or port via the deploy skill with custom vendoring.
installPickHint: In the dialog, pick the runtime/business-os/local-modules folder of your CTOX install.
doneNote: Module {id} written. Dropping is installing: after a Business OS serve restart the app appears in the launcher. Original source is kept under {id}/source/.
noPicker: This browser lacks the folder dialog (File System Access API). Use Chrome/Edge or the deploy skill.
tooManyFiles: Too many files ({count}) — please port via the deploy skill.
idInvalid: Module id: lowercase letters, digits and dashes.
